basic_details.job_title: NIT Jamshedpur Psychologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur (NIT Jamshedpur) Psychologist Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website of NIT Jamshedpur. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Jamshedpur Psychologist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Psychology, PG Diploma/Certificate in General psychology/counselling, at least one year experience as Counsellor/Psychologist. Desirable: M.Phil/Ph.D in Clinical Psychology with RCI license.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Psychology PG Diploma/ Certificate courses in General psychology/counselling At least one year as Counsellor/ Psychologist in any academic institute/ hospital. (Certificates to be enclosed in support of above). Desirable: M.Phil/ Ph.D in Clinical Psychology with RCI license & Good oral and written skills in Hindi and English.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1200/- per session of 2 hours, not exceeding Rs.40,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Psychologist: Rs. 1200/- per session of 2 hours and not exceeding Rs.40,000/- per month

selection_process: Application screening Shortlisting of candidates Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.NITJSR.AC.IN.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Jamshedpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Jamshedpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Jamshedpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in Psychology PG Diploma/ Certificate courses in General psychology/counselling At least one year as Counsellor/ Psychologist in any academic institute/ hospital. (Certificates to be enclosed in support of above). Desirable: M.Phil/ Ph.D in Clinical Psychology with RCI license & Good oral and written skills in Hindi and English.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Psychologist: Rs. 1200/- per session of 2 hours and not exceeding Rs.40,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application screening Shortlisting of candidates Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.NITJSR.AC.IN. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Psychologist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Psychologist post at NIT Jamshedpur is 09 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the institute by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Psychologist posts at NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Psychologist post at NIT Jamshedpur, with one position for a male Psychologist and one for a female Psychologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Jamshedpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NIT Jamshedpur Psychologist Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their completed application form by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Psychologist post at NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: The salary for the Psychologist post is Rs. 1200/- per session of 2 hours, not exceeding Rs.40,000/- per month, on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Psychologist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master's degree in Psychology, a PG Diploma/Certificate in General psychology/counselling, and at least one year of experience as a Counsellor/Psychologist.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Psychologist post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Psychologist post at NIT Jamshedpur is preferably below 50 years. No specific minimum age is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NIT Jamshedpur Psychologist Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Psychologist position involves application screening, shortlisting of eligible candidates, and a final interview round.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: The official website for National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur is www.NITJSR.AC.IN, where candidates can find the official notification and application form.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is the Psychologist position at NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: The Psychologist position at NIT Jamshedpur is a contract-based job, offering an opportunity to work in the education sector.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Jamshedpur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur is located in Jamshedpur, Jharkhand, with the pincode 831014. The application should be sent to the Student Welfare office.
